mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id AS tenantId, sync_direction AS syncDirection, source_env AS sourceEnv, target_env AS targetEnv, config_types AS configTypes, total_items AS totalItems, success_items AS successItems, failed_items AS failedItems, skipped_items AS skippedItems, sync_status AS syncStatus, detail_json AS detailJson, operator_id AS operatorId, created_at AS createdAt FROM batch.config_sync_log WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO batch.config_sync_log ( tenant_id, sync_direction, source_env, target_env, config_types, total_items, success_items, failed_items, skipped_items, sync_status, detail_json, operator_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{syncDirection}, #{sourceEnv}, #{targetEnv}, #{configTypes}, #{totalItems}, #{successItems}, #{failedItems}, #{skippedItems}, #{syncStatus}, #{detailJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{operatorId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE batch.config_sync_log SET success_items = #{successItems}, failed_items = #{failedItems}, skipped_items = #{skippedItems}, sync_status = #{syncStatus}, detail_json = #{detailJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
